notes: WFS desc 'Gas' — gas discovery family; 2101 boreholes in 2026-07-18 snapshot
WFS desc 'Oil' — oil discovery family; 1128 boreholes
WFS desc 'Oil and gas' — combined oil+gas discovery; 192 boreholes
WFS desc 'Gas with oil shows' — primary content is gas (discovery); the oil is shows-grade only, so label 1 with shows=false; 23 boreholes
WFS desc 'Oil with gas shows' — primary content is oil (discovery); the gas is shows-grade only, so label 1 with shows=false; 5 boreholes
WFS desc 'Dry' — valid dry test; 825 boreholes
WFS desc 'Gas shows' — shows/traces class, no producible content; 89 boreholes
WFS desc 'Oil shows' — shows/traces class; 47 boreholes
WFS desc 'Gas and oil shows' — shows of both phases, no producer content (contrast GWOS/OWGS where one phase is a discovery); 24 boreholes

excluded-class: WFS desc 'Technical failure' — borehole failed mechanically before testing its objective; no geological outcome exists, so it is NOT a discovery and NOT a valid dry test; 1072 boreholes
excluded-class: WFS desc 'Rock salt' — non-hydrocarbon target result (salt mining boreholes); NOT a hydrocarbon discovery; 676 boreholes
excluded-class: WFS desc 'Groundwater' — water-bearing outcome; NOT a hydrocarbon discovery; 226 boreholes
excluded-class: WFS desc 'Spring water' — water outcome; NOT a hydrocarbon discovery; 10 boreholes
excluded-class: WFS desc 'Coal' — non-hydrocarbon (mining-era) result; NOT a hydrocarbon discovery; 80 boreholes
excluded-class: WFS desc 'Unknown' — outcome not recorded by the regulator; a discovery cannot be asserted, so NOT a discovery; 59 boreholes

excluded-class: blank BOREHOLE_RESULT_CODE (null in WFS, kept as empty string) — no recorded outcome, mostly pre-1900/state boreholes; a discovery cannot be asserted, so NOT a discovery; 171 boreholes
